name: Strangers Lurk
short_description: What starts as strange phone calls from a unknown stranger who sometimes just breaths, Eerie creeks and sounds through out the house soon turns into a deadly game of cat and mouse. The calls might just be coming from INSIDE the house!
detailed_description:
Strangers Lurk is a next gen horror experience played from the POV of a bodycam as you try to survive a night of being stalked and taunted by a unknown masked stranger.

Story:

Play as Erica who works as a nanny for insurance purposes she is required to wear a bodycam while sitting for people. Its a friday night and the neighbors down the road had their sitter cancel last minute and asked you if you could come instead. What starts as a normal nights baby sitting becomes a chilling fight for survival as a masked maniac taunts you. Will you survive the night? Or will you become another victim of this deranged masked stranger.

KEY FEATURES:

Multiple areas to explore:
Set across 2 levels with multiple houses to explore with where danger lurks at every turn!

Realistic Environment: 
This game is built with Unreal Engine 5 to create a terrifying realistic home invasion experience.

Jump Scares
A masked maniac on the loose and dark corners everywhere your every move should be considered or it could be your last!
